点击\"新建产品\"开始记录你的产品使用体验: Click "New Product" to start recording your product experience
点击\"新建流程\"开始记录操作步骤: Click "New Flow" to start recording steps
在 Vault 根目录下的文件夹名称: Folder name under the Vault root directory
需要支持 Vision（图片分析）能力的模型: Requires a model with Vision (image analysis) capability
配置悬浮窗自动录制功能的全局快捷键和截图工具。两个快捷键都配置后才能启用自动录制: Configure global hotkeys and screenshot tool for the floating window auto-recording. Both hotkeys must be set to enable auto-recording.
留空表示禁用，支持格式: f9, ctrl+shift+r, alt+f1 等: Leave empty to disable. Supported formats: f9, ctrl+shift+r, alt+f1, etc.
留空表示禁用，建议与开始热键不同: Leave empty to disable. Should differ from the start hotkey
导出为 ZIP 文件（包含 JSON 数据 + 图片），可在另一台电脑导入。: Export as ZIP file (JSON data + images), importable on another computer.
上传从其他实例导出的 ZIP 文件，智能识别新增和更新的数据。: Upload a ZIP file exported from another instance. New and updated data will be detected automatically.
自动保留最近 3 天的备份。导入操作前会自动创建备份。: Backups from the last 3 days are kept automatically. A backup is created before each import.
guide_s1_body: Create a Product → New Flow → Record Steps (screenshot + description + score) → AI Auto-Analysis → Export to Obsidian Knowledge Base
guide_s2_body: Open the desktop floating window via the system tray icon. Select a product and flow in the floating window, then use Ctrl+V to paste screenshots for quick recording, or use auto-recording mode.
guide_s3_body: Configure Start/Stop Recording Hotkeys in Settings, then start auto-recording via the REC button in the floating window or by pressing the hotkey. During recording, every left mouse click triggers a screenshot (clicking on empty areas also captures). After each capture, you need to enter a step title or skip before the next capture. Unwanted screenshots can be deleted later on the web page.
guide_s4_body: Configure AI API (OpenAI-compatible) in Settings. After saving a step, it automatically generates interaction analysis, experience evaluation, and improvement suggestions.

e.g. Registration flow, Purchase flow, Search...
